welcome.help_note: If you get stuck, every section in Moimio has hints in the interface. You can change languages anytime from the user menu.
welcome.phase1.body: Name, dates, groups, form fields. Everything the allocation engine needs to know about the container.

welcome.phase2.body: Participants register themselves through a link you share. Group codes keep families together automatically.

welcome.phase2.title: People arrive.

welcome.phase3.title: Everyone fits.
welcome.subtitle: You're all set. Here's what Moimio does and how to get started.
welcome.title: Welcome to Moimio
welcome.what_it_does_body: Moimio's core is its allocation engine — it takes your list of participants and fits them into rooms, small groups, tables, or whatever structure your event needs. It respects capacity, gender rules, marks, and which participants registered together, so you get a proposal that is already close to what you would have chosen by hand. Registrations, check-in, and the rest of the app exist to feed and finish the allocation. The lifecycle that gets you there runs through three phases — Setup, Registration, and Event.
